settings.text:
At MARCO DAL MASO, we believe sustainability and luxury can coexist authentically. All of our jewelry is meticulously crafted in our Italian factory, where we maintain complete oversight of the production process to ensure the highest quality and ethical standards.

By combining our direct involvement in manufacturing with a steadfast commitment to ethical craftsmanship and sustainability, we adhere to the Responsible Jewellery Council’s (RJC) Code of Practices. Additionally, we are proud to work exclusively with RJC-certified suppliers, reinforcing our dedication to creating every piece to the highest ethical, social, and environmental standards.

settings.title: Recycled Materials
settings.subheading: We use 100% recycled silver and 18kt gold, significantly reducing CO₂ emissions compared to traditional mining. This process ensures our jewelry maintains the same high quality and luxurious finish as those made from newly mined metals.

settings.subheading: We use 100% recycled silver and 18kt gold, significantly reducing CO₂ emissions compared to traditional mining. This process ensures our jewelry maintains the same high quality and luxurious finish as those made from newly mined metals.

settings.title: Ethical Sourcing
settings.text: Our gemstones are sourced from trusted partners who guarantee conflict-free materials and eco-friendly practices. We only work with suppliers certified by the Responsible Jewellery Council (RJC), underscoring our commitment to ethical sourcing and sustainable luxury jewelry.

settings.title: Local Craftsmanship
settings.text: Each piece of MARCO DAL MASO jewelry is handcrafted in Italy by skilled artisans. This local production reduces carbon emissions from transportation, supports the local economy, and ensures the highest quality craftsmanship.

settings.title: Recycling Program
settings.text:
We offer a jewelry recycling program to further support our initiatives. You can find out more by visiting this page. Simply fill out the form and within two working days, we’ll send you shipping instructions. Once we receive your old pieces, they’ll be expertly recycled into new silver and gold and we’ll give you $50 off your next MARCO DAL MASO purchase as a thank you.

Learn More

A Sustainable Choice

Choosing MARCO DAL MASO means supporting a brand dedicated to sustainability and exquisite craftsmanship. Our commitment to sustainable luxury jewelry, ethical sourcing, recycled silver and gold, and local craftsmanship sets us apart. Join us in making a positive impact, one piece of jewelry at a time.
